Bio.name: Felipe Rubio
Bio.title: Head of Paid Media + AI builder
Bio.subtitle: at Viña Concha y Toro
Bio.tagline: I run USD 2M+ in digital ad spend and code my own AI-powered tools.

About.title: About
About.p1: Journalist by training who ended up building AI SaaS. Five years leading paid media across LATAM — USD 2M+ invested, up to 14x ROAS, teams in Chile, Brazil, and Mexico.
About.p2: In 2023 I stopped asking the agency. I learned FastAPI, Next.js, and the Claude API because it was the fastest path to do my job better. Today I run <rocketmonk>RocketMonk</rocketmonk> — a multi-tenant SaaS that connects 19 professional APIs and automates the operation I've led for years.
About.p3: I also build automations, corporate sites, executive dashboards, and internal tools. The difference with a traditional dev is that I know what decision to make before writing the query. The difference with a traditional marketing leader is that I implement it myself.
About.p4: I've closed partnerships with <scotiabank>Scotiabank</scotiabank>, <bci>BCI</bci>, <uber>Uber</uber>, Sura, and Consorcio for USD 300K in direct annual revenue, and led the digital investment of <descorcha>Descorcha</descorcha> across three LATAM markets.

Stack.title: Stack
Stack.kicker: Marketing, engineering, and everything in between

Footer.built: Designed and built by Felipe Rubio. Made with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Vercel.
